page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A toolkit for dynamic analysis of nucleosome and protein occupancy by sequencing, version 2
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Designed for genome-wide comparative analysis of nucleosome maps. It detect single-nucleotide-resolution change in positions(location), enrichment (occupancy), and fuzziness (phasing, positioning) of each nucleosome unit.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Designed for genome-wide comparative analysis of nucleosome maps. It detect single-nucleotide-resolution change in positions(location), enrichment (occupancy), and fuzziness (phasing, positioning) of each nucleosome unit.
